task_completion.description: The agent entered the correct product title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text field for the product title in the Drupal Commerce interface contains the exact text 'Organic Bamboo Wireless Charger'.

task_completion.description: The agent entered the correct SKU.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text field for the SKU contains the exact text 'OBW-CHR-01'.

task_completion.description: The agent entered the correct price.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text field for the price contains '39.99'.

task_completion.description: The agent entered a product description highlighting the required features.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text area or WYSIWYG editor for the product description contains text that mentions 'eco-friendly bamboo' (or similar phrasing) and 'Qi-compatible wireless charging'.

task_completion.description: The agent ensured the product status is set to published.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox, toggle, or dropdown for the product status indicates 'Published' (checked or selected) rather than 'Draft' or 'Unpublished'.

task_completion.description: The agent successfully saved the new product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Product Organic Bamboo Wireless Charger has been created' or 'has been saved') is visible, or the product is shown in the store's active product list.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the Drupal Commerce GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) navigating the Drupal admin interface, rather than terminal windows or API testing tools.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the web forms to create the product.
integrity.visual_evidence: Input fields, buttons, and text areas in the Drupal interface are actively being filled out and clicked, rather than the agent just viewing a text file or mocking a UI.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or database scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open running SQL commands, Drush commands, or other scripts to insert the product directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected product title is 'Organic Bamboo Wireless Charger'. The expected SKU is 'OBW-CHR-01'. The expected price is '39.99' (USD). The product status must be 'published' (not draft or unpublished). The product description must highlight its eco-friendly bamboo construction and Qi-compatible wireless charging capability.
